prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 33 名，近年稳定在 28–33 名区间，属国内顶尖理工类院校；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（2 起事件：困难认定争议、师德失范通报），但整体影响有限；抖音热度「较热」（总排名第 33，视频 27 条），反映报考关注度中等偏上；信息与通信工程 A+、电子科学与技术 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、仪器科学与技术 A-、光学工程 A-、管理科学与工程 A-；与招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、集成电路等）高度匹配，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信 2026 年「高热推荐」，计算机类「推荐」（67.8），电气工程「高热推荐」（74.28），对电子科技大学核心专业形成报考热度支撑；江西省 2026 年考生总数约 474,900 人（较 2025 年 472,480 人略增），物理类估算约 267,844 人（+1,419 人），竞争略有加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都，属西南地区；江西省非本省招生，无显著地域偏好加成；该校在江西省招生 占比约 3.3%（2025 年），属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026 年招生计划持平、本省考生总数略增、核心专业热度持续高位、声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，在 2025 年基准 3694 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 3744 名，区间 3244–4244 名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）（通信工程、电子信息工程等）
- 微电子科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

- 工科试验班（电子工程类）（电子科学与技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 智能电网信息工程（AI交叉复合型创新人才双学位培养计划）
- 软件工程（沙河校区）（国家卓越工程师教育培养计划特色班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类（光电集成与光网络）
- 工科试验班（机器人、电气信息、智能制造）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 3244–4244 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（计算机类、电子信息类）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<3244 名）可重点冲击一档；位次接近区间上限（>4244 名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3488→4221→3182→2877→3694, showing significant fluctuations over the past 5 years with no clear trend; the baseline for 2025 is about 3694, which is about 817 positions lower than 2024 (2877), a normal fluctuation; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Physics Category was 147 in 2021, 149 in 2022, 155 in 2023, 155 in 2024, and 156 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 156, unchanged from 2025, with no obvious expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic science and engineering universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (2 incidents: hardship identification controversy, teacher ethics misconduct report), but the overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 33rd, 27 videos), reflecting moderate to high application attention; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-; highly matched with enrollment majors (Computer, Electronic Information, Integrated Circuits, etc.), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication is 'highly recommended' in 2026, Computer is 'recommended' (67.8), Electrical Engineering is 'highly recommended' (74.28), supporting the popularity of core majors at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China; the total number of examinees in Jiangxi in 2026 is about 474,900 (slightly increased from 472,480 in 2025), with Physics Category estimated at about 267,844 (+1,419), competition slightly intensified; the university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region; Jiangxi is not a local province, with no significant regional preference advantage; the university's enrollment in Jiangxi accounts for about 3.3% (2025), a normal out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight increase in local examinee numbers, sustained high popularity of core majors, and limited impact of slightly negative reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 3694; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3744, with a range of 3244–4244.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Electronic Information (Information and Communication) (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (National Demonstration Microelectronics College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering) (Electronic Science and Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Smart Grid Information Engineering (AI Cross-Disciplinary Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus) (National Excellent Engineer Education and Training Program Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information and Physical Science Composite Training)
- Materials Science and Engineering (AI Cross-Disciplinary Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Management and Electronic Engineering Dual Degree Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3244–4244, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer, Electronic Information) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<3244), you can focus on Tier 1; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>4244), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1156→1355→1227→1373→1443, showing a slow overall backward trend, with a backward shift of about 287 places in the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1443 places; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jiangxi Province was 8 students in 2021, 8 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 4 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 4 students, unchanged from 2025, continuing the stable trend after recent enrollment reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 33rd on the Soft Science main list, a top-tier science and engineering university, but liberal arts are not its strong area; reputation in 2026 is slightly negative (2 incidents), but mainly related to campus management, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', overall attention is moderate; UESTC's liberal arts-related disciplines (Foreign Languages and Literature, Public Management) have not entered A- or above ratings, so liberal arts strength is relatively average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university only admits Social Science Experimental Class (Public Management and Law Compound Talent Training) and Foreign Languages and Literature categories in liberal arts; related major categories have divergent popularity (Law: divergent, wait-and-see; Foreign Languages: generally wait-and-see); the estimated number of history category examinees in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 207,056 (slightly increased by about 1,001 from 206,055 in 2025), competition slightly intensifies; UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local province enrollment, with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight increase in local history category examinees, and liberal arts not being the university's strong area, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1443 places; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1473 places, with a range of 1252–1694 places.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Public Governance) (Administrative Management, Urban Management, Law).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
